query:
SELECT wh.nomeGestante, wh.sentAt, wh.status
FROM whatsappHistorico wh
WHERE wh.templateId = 60001
AND DATE(wh.sentAt) = CURDATE()
ORDER BY wh.sentAt
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3v7At4WPQpm4aRf.9e6a8ae0e28e --database bSA4q7aMJsJeSmafooCq7A --execute
